---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to cart recovery, the email sequence, reporting, or privacy handling
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to achieve, and what makes it hard today? Describe the store or shopper scenario
rather than a specific solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like the plugin to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope check

- [ ] This keeps the plugin's no-tracking-pixels, consent-first privacy stance.
- [ ] This does not require a new runtime dependency or an external SaaS.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples from other tools.
